ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production batch */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database where the batch is recorded */,
  "serial_number" INTEGER /* Serial number of the batch */,
  "lot_number" INTEGER /* Lot number of the batch */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number of the batch */,
  "ai_date" TEXT /* Date when the AI test was conducted */,
  "ai_time" TEXT /* Time when the AI test was conducted */,
  "ai_system" TEXT /* AI system used for testing */,
  "ai_operator" TEXT /* Operator who conducted the AI test */,
  "production_line" INTEGER /* Production line where the batch was produced */,
  "batch_status" TEXT /* Status of the batch (e.g., in_progress, completed, failed) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the batch was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the batch was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_batches_ai_operator FOREIGN KEY ("ai_operator") REFERENCES operators ("operator_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_batches_ai_system FOREIGN KEY ("ai_system") REFERENCES ai_systems ("system_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_batches_production_line FOREIGN KEY ("production_line") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production batch the component belongs to */,
  "item_number" INTEGER /* Item number of the component */,
  "item_algorithm" INTEGER /* Algorithm used to test the component */,
  "designator" TEXT /* Designator of the component (e.g., DIE_DWire_66.Row_1.Col_1) */,
  "defect_description" TEXT /* Description of any defects found in the component */,
  "udd_code" INTEGER /* Unique Defect Detection Code (UDD Code) */,
  "component_status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  "measurement_value" TEXT /* Measurement value of the component */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES production_batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_item_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("item_algorithm") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_defect_description FOREIGN KEY ("defect_description") REFERENCES defects ("defect_description")
)

CREATE TABLE "ai_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AI system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the AI system */,
  "system_description" TEXT /* Description of the AI system */,
  "system_version" TEXT /* Version of the AI system */,
  "system_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the AI system */,
  "system_model" TEXT /* Model of the AI system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "operator_email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "operator_role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., maint, tech) */,
  "operator_department" TEXT /* Department of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "defect_code" TEXT /* Code of the defect */,
  "defect_description" TEXT /* Description of the defect */,
  "defect_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the defect (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "defect_category" TEXT /* Category of the defect (e.g., cosmetic, functional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of the algorithm (e.g., machine learning, rule-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "line_description" TEXT /* Description of the production line */,
  "line_location" TEXT /* Location of the production line */,
  "line_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the production line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., quality control, admin, operator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time when the activity was performed */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the user acquired the role */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's role expired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
